tasks.desc: Oops - Let's put this back together
Sweep Holden out of the room
Ask Holden to rake the leaves
Ask Holden to water the flower
Ask Holden to remove the flower
Try to make Holden sit down
Ask Holden to care for the butterfly
Ask him to arrange the flowers
Ask Holden to rake the sand
Ask Holden to sort the seeds
Have Holden sort all the screws
Use the chair to reach the top
